text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There they are… Looks like they're
doing well… Perhaps I should get
a little bit closer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My oh my… Care to explain why you're
spying on our underclassmen?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy, I know you can do it.
Just go up to them and ask to join 'em.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What?! I would never dare
to meddle so obviously!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This is… Yes, this is merely surveillance!
I must confirm whether or not they are
studying!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Those two were rather worried about their
upcoming test, so I naturally took notice.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I refuse to have anyone in my entourage embarrass me with a failing grade.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure they'd like it better if you
called them your "cute little juniors".

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: …This is why no one calls you cute.
